methodology.formula: monthlyPortfolioRent = ccMix × ccRent + (1 − ccMix) × duRent; ccRent = duRent × ccPremium
methodology.perStateWeighting: Σ(facilities_REIT × portfolioAnnualRent_REIT) / Σ(facilities_REIT) across all REITs operating in the state.

portfolioRentSources.EXR: FY2025 10-K MD&A same-store annual rent per occupied SF (extracted via scripts/edgar/extract-same-store-growth.mjs)
portfolioRentSources.CUBE: FY2025 10-K MD&A same-store annual rent per occupied SF (extracted via scripts/edgar/extract-same-store-growth.mjs)
portfolioRentSources.PSA: PSA FY2025 same-store revenue ÷ same-store NRSF (Q4/FY2025 Press Release, BusinessWire 2026-02-12). 10-K narrative disclosure is qualitative.
portfolioRentSources.SMA: Imputed conservative estimate aligned with SmartStop FY2024 10-K. Pending Day-6 same-store extraction.

methodology.ccDuSplitSource: Industry standard: ~80% CC premium over drive-up of equivalent size. Source: Green Street Self-Storage Sector Report Q4 2025 + SSA Global benchmarks + cross-REIT earnings call commentary.
methodology.ccMixSource: Cross-REIT average from each issuer's FY2025 10-K Item 2 Properties section: PSA 70% / EXR 78% / CUBE 73% → 73% blended.
methodology.geographicAdjustmentSource: State-level rent variation derived from Schedule III weighted gross carrying $/SF. Per-state weightedPSF / national weightedPSF ($133/SF), square-root damped, clamped to [0.55, 1.65]. The weightedPSF figures are computed by aggregate-comps.mjs from each REIT's Schedule III gross carrying value disclosures.

EXR.source: Extra Space Storage Inc FY2025 10-K MD&A same-store disclosure (accession 0001289490-26-000011)

PSA.source: PSA FY2025 same-store revenue ÷ same-store NRSF (Q4/FY2025 Press Release, BusinessWire 2026-02-12). 10-K narrative disclosure is qualitative.

SMA.source: Imputed conservative estimate aligned with SmartStop FY2024 10-K. Pending Day-6 same-store extraction.

states.derivation: Weighted annual = Σ(facilities × portfolio$/SF) / Σ(facilities). CC mix 73%, CC premium 1.80× over DU. Geographic adjustment: sqrt(state PSF $129 / national PSF $133) clamped [0.55, 1.65].

citationRule: Each state band cites the specific 10-K accession # + filing URL of every REIT contributing to the weighted average. National fallback aggregates across all weighted state samples. PSA portfolio rent ($21.48/SF) is derived from FY2025 same-store revenue ÷ NRSF disclosed in PSA Q4/FY2025 press release; SMA rent ($15.00/SF) is imputed pending same-store extraction.
